stemHtml: Two aircraft are 80 NM from the destination, both tuned to its ATIS. Aircraft X is at 1,500 ft and Y at 15,000 ft. Whose VHF reception will be better and why?

options.a: Aircraft Y, because higher altitude improves VHF line-of-sight range.
options.b: Aircraft X, because lower altitude reduces signal attenuation.
options.c: Both equally, since they are equidistant from the station.
options.d: Altitude has no influence on VHF reception.
